body:
<!--- THESE LINES ARE COMMENTED -->
## Purpose 
See the failures in the [most recent build](https://buildkite.com/clima/climacoupler-longruns/builds/993#_)

Unrelated, but this PR also fixes the Input module tests. These were added in #5294 but windows CI wasn't required to pass to merge, so some tests fail on windows. They're fixed here in a separate commit

## Content
- change the RMSE check from a strict test to a warning, since this often fails as the model changes
- for the CMIP longruns, decrease all dts back to 120 seconds. It's been unstable since we increased the dts, and we should check that this is because of the dt change and not something else
title: longrun fixes
